name: Suspicious Living-of-the-land Binary Launched from Apex One Widgets Folder
description: The rule detects a command injection via remote code execution (RCE) vulnerabilities on the Apex One Management Console (on-premise) via CVE-2025-54948 or CVE-2025-54987.

filterSets.name: Suspicious Living-of-the-land Binary Launched from Apex One Widgets Folder

author: Lucas Silva & Jack Walsh
